title: stratt_entities reserved output
description: The reserved OpenTofu output that projects Entities with Run provenance (ADR-0017, charter §4 provision→configure). v1 observations carry identity and labels only — Facets arrive from the configure Step (§1.1: no undemanded schemas).

kind.description: Entity kind (domain data, e.g. endpoint, instance).

identityKeys.description: Identity scheme → value; correlation happens here (§1.2).

labels.description: Selection labels — the v1 binding surface for downstream Views.
